rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The agent sandbox was isolated from the actual codebase; it could not read src/ files until the user confirmed the correct working directory.","scope":"environment"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Use `zod` for request body validation in the new HTTP endpoints (already in use elsewhere in the codebase).","scope":"validation"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a plan references files the agent cannot access, the agent should ask for directory confirmation before proceeding — not assume the path.","scope":"planning"}]}
